SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2021 Set For Trial On Nov-03-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 306

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-03-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Catherine Allen, Plaintiff/Respondent; Rodney Parker, Defendant/Appellant

Parties are placed under oath.

Plaintiff/Respondent avers that the Notice of Appeal is untimely and moves to dismiss the Appeal. The Court defers judgment on the motion.

Plaintiff/Respondent Exhibit 4 [09/14/2020 e-mail/spreadsheet] introduced.

Plaintiff/Respondent Exhibit 1 [Credit Card Statement] introduced.

Plaintiff/Respondent Exhibit 2 [Venmo Statement] introduced.

Plaintiff/Respondent Exhibit 3 [Bank Statement/Checks] introduced.

Plaintiff/Respondent Exhibit 5 [Nordstrom charge] introduced.

Plaintiff/Respondent Exhibit 6 [Various text messages] introduced.

Plaintiff/Respondent Exhibit 7 [Various e-mails] introduced.

Plaintiff/Respondent Exhibit 8 [various Notices of Judgment against Mr. Parker] introduced.

Defendant/Respondent Exhibit A [various documents] introduced.

Exhibits retained.
